site.name: Resource Translator
site.defaultDescription: Documentation for the Resource Translator GitHub Action — automated machine translation of resource files via Azure AI Translator.

header.languageDescription: Shandura peji rimwe chete mune mumwe mutauro.

search.title: Zvinyorwa zvekutsvaga
search.idleHelp: Tsvaga zvinyorwa nemusoro wenyaya, fomati yefaira, sarudzo yekugadzirisa, kana recipe. Shandisa {up} {down} kuti uvhure, {enter} kuvhura.
search.error: Kutsvaga kwekutsvaga hakuwanikwe muDebian. Gadzira chivakwa chekugadzira.
